creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I I never received the information that I requested, so I figure that 
this is not a problem and we will not add the usergroup. If you would 
like this to change, please send me information about the usergroup, we 
have a list of usergroups, and it would be awesome when the information 
matches a similiar entry.
